summary: Full backend (17/17 pytest) and frontend (landing/catalog/detail/compare/submit/about/nav) testing of EcoLens MVP. All API endpoints work including AI story generation via Claude Sonnet 4.5 (cold ~6s, cached <1s). All UI flows operational. One real visual bug found in ImpactChart (bars not rendering due to recharts container size warning).

ui_bugs.issue: Recharts ResponsiveContainer logs 'width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' on detail page. Visually only the 'Recycled %' bar renders; CO2/Water/Energy bars are invisible/empty in the breakdown. Likely the parent of <ResponsiveContainer> lacks an explicit height (or is rendered before layout is measured).

issues: Score gauge counter animation initially renders mid-animation value (e.g. 78/100 then climbs to 88/100). Cosmetic only; final value matches API.

action_items: Fix ImpactChart sizing: give the chart's parent wrapper an explicit height (e.g. h-64) or set a fixed height on <ResponsiveContainer>, so CO2/Water/Energy/Recycled bars all render.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~455 lines — still readable but approaching the 700-line split threshold; consider extracting LCA estimator and AI story logic into modules as more endpoints are added.
/api/packagings/categories must be declared BEFORE /api/packagings/{pid} (it is — good). Ordering preserved.
Story endpoint correctly excludes Mongo _id via projection {'_id': 0} in cache lookup. Submission GET also strips _id. Good.
submission insert uses doc.copy() before insert; motor mutates the dict to add _id, so the returned model is unaffected. Pattern is correct.

estimate_report transport CO2 calc has an inert simplification: `mass_kg/1000 * km * 0.062 * 1000/1000` reduces to `mass_kg * km * 0.062 / 1000`. The /1000 effectively makes transport contribution very small — works but the redundant *1000/1000 should be removed for clarity.
Pydantic Literal validation on score_grade enforces A-E correctly. Good.
Frontend: react-router navigation works; all pages have data-testid='*-page'. CSS uses custom forest/cream/terracotta palette as specified.
No mocked APIs detected. AI story uses real EMERGENT_LLM_KEY + Anthropic Claude Sonnet 4.5 via emergentintegrations.
test_credentials: Not applicable — no auth in this app.
seed_data_creation: Submissions: created TEST_-prefixed submission via POST /api/submissions during test_create_submission and TEST_UI Bottle via the Submit page UI flow. Stories cache for pp-yogurt-cup/editorial and glass-milk-bottle/editorial were populated in db.stories.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/test_ecolens.py covers all 11 endpoints incl. AI story (cold+cache). It uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL env var. The only fix needed is ImpactChart height (frontend). Re-run pytest after any backend change; reuse the same playwright flow for UI regression.
